headline: Experienced Product and Technology leader; Chief Product Officer, Global Director Product Management, Global Product Strategy Director & CPTO roles.    Focused on Project to Product transformation & Product-Led Growth
summary:
A highly respected product and technology leader, an experienced commercially driven, innovative and strategic practitioner, instigating and delivering many product, data & digital led value driven & transformational initiatives.

A human-led leader, championing diverse & inclusive teams with extensive experience across several business sectors, appreciating the need to create an environment for cross-functional expertise to flourish and solve complex problems.

Accomplished in setting a clear vision and communicating a concise strategy for continuous value delivery, product-led growth and commercial return through decisive decision making. 

I am looking to apply my commercial product mindset in a native, product-first organisation with a ruthless focus on user and customer value.

experiences.title: Snr Director, Product
experiences.description:
Leading product development of media trading products (SSP & DSP) collaborating with key customers, partners and industry bodies in relation to future product strategy and long-term business development.

Responsible for driving the product vision, implementing a strategy to create transformational change in the OOH industry.  Delivering value to customers, partners and the business through product growth by extending capabilities to increase transactional volumes, whist creating efficiencies for customers to focus on effective campaigns for advertisers. 

Accountable for evolving UX & product design capabilities across the organisation to enhance customer & user experience, supporting product-led growth initiatives through acquisition and retention.

experiences.title: Product Consultant/Advisor
experiences.description:
Advised & supported co-founders to develop product vision, strategy, and go-to-market approach in preparation for seed funding. Successfully securing high-profile domain specific investors, with preparation for series-A funding.

Development of market & user research across B2B2C & D2C opportunities, informing development prioritisation balancing mid-term commercial sustainability with long-term strategic objectives.

Advising on product & technology development approach and team structure to balance innovation agility and velocity, whilst building stable and scalable products for longer-term commercial viability.

Consulting on product-led growth strategies for user acquisition, expansion, conversion, and retention, to compliment other growth channels.

experiences.title: Product Consultant/Advisor
experiences.description:
Advising Global Leadership team (CEO, CTO, CRO, CSO & CPO) and collaborating with key customers, partners and industry bodies in relation to future product strategy and long-term business development.

Responsible for developing a product vision, strategy, and associated investment case to simplify OOH transactional workflow, creating efficiencies for customers to focus on effective campaigns for advertisers. 

Tasked with introducing product-led growth strategies and associated organisational change across the business.

experiences.title: Global Director Product Management
experiences.description:
Responsible for partnering with global senior executives and across all service lines, defining a product vision and strategy, supporting the ambition of being the most integrated marketing agency network globally.

Accountable for developing a platform to mediate a consistent experience for internal and external users. 
Enabling collaboration on proposals, transparently manage workflows for marketing campaigns inc. media planning & optimisation, creative ideation, content production, customer experience and e-commerce solutions.

The platform is integral in supporting pipeline new business & retained global revenue.

Achievements:
•	Defined and own the global product strategy, navigating a diverse set of stakeholders with conflicting priorities 
•	Creating allegiance with senior global leadership and agree value driven goals, objectives and results to drive business change and commercial success
•	Build, lead and inspire a diverse and cross-functional team of engineering, design and product managers to bring to life a vision and strategy for continuous value delivery for an integrated GTM proposition 
•	Pioneer & scale new diversified SaaS revenues generated directly from products across the organisation

experiences.title: Global Director Product Strategy
experiences.description:
Responsible for defining & articulating the product vision for dentsu International global media agency network.

Accountable for the product strategy of a platform to support the end-to-end campaign lifecycle of media campaigns, from brief inception, audience analytics & visualisation, media campaign creation, performance reporting & content management.  

Required deep collaboration with several stakeholders, who commonly had conflicting priorities, legacy systems and processes that were impacted.

Products are integral in delivering significant new business & retained global revenue, whilst enabling multi-million pound efficiency and technology depreciation savings per year.

Achievements:
•	Introduced customer focused Co-Creation Product Communities evolving the product development approach to focus on business and user value
•	Shifted to a consolidated, value driven roadmap in a “now, next & future” view for easy consumption 
•	Established a cross-disciplinary action group; developed a framework for processes and integrations, delivering a key component of the global product strategy
•	Identified & turned around underperforming product teams, resolved issues increasing velocity and value delivery

experiences.title: Chief Product Officer
experiences.description:
Proactively instigated and led a transformational programme, enabling Posterscope to evolve from an analogue, labour-intensive, manual organisation to a data driven and digitally connected business. 

Enabling efficiencies through automation of processes and creating competitive differentiation through advanced geo-location analytics, optimisation, visualisation and activation.

The platform & associated products were developed and deployed to 30+ global markets across all regions, managing over £1bn+ of OOH media spend and transactions, supporting £30m annual revenue.

An essential component in billings new businesses wins, and solely responsible for significant efficiency savings and incremental direct revenue.

Achievements:
•	Recognised as an established and industry technology leader in the media sector; leading industry bodies, contributing and presenting at many public conferences and events
•	Achieved industry first initiatives by integrating internal Posterscope platforms directly with external media suppliers to transact OOH media campaigns in real-time
•	Built and led a diverse and representative, cross-functional technology team from scratch over a period of 5 years the team grew to 50+ people 
•	Developed and coached team members who went on to gain external recognition (Female Tech Leader Awards) and achieve in their personal careers both internally and externally
•	Supported the acquisition of a technology platform business; leading the integration of the technology team into the wider organisation and driving the product evolution to support SaaS
•	Established and chaired a cross-industry ‘OOH Standards Committee’ that included representatives from several businesses across the sector; resulted in an industry wide MDM solution and Open Direct standards for automated transactions.
•	Identified the key product opportunities and established commercial and operational priorities to build a viable business case and secure a £20+ multi-year investment

recommendations:
Rachel Earl

Gavin is a visionary leader, compassionate manager, and exceptional business strategist. He envisioned and delivered transformational products which continue to be integral to our business operations, client servicing and commercial proposition. His achievements prove his aptitude as a technology leader, but his qualities extend far beyond his operational and commercial successes, it is his team leadership skills that set him apart from anyone I have ever worked for. He leads with passion, empathy, and authenticity. He has a way of championing every team member through acknowledging and fostering individual qualities and skills and ensuring that each person has the right support in place to reach their potential. Gavin empowered me to feel confident in changing career direction, encouraged me to take the leap and move to a new country and consistently created an environment where I could feel valued and motivated. Gavin is knowledgeable, hard-working and ambitious but also very thoughtful and considerate of everyone around him – the best qualities you could hope for in a manager or leader!

Jessica Reyneke

Gavin is a natural visionary and thought-leader who understands the critical importance of maintaining a strong product offering, as well as the need to constantly grow revenue. His ability to sustain existing product lines while opening up new opportunities helped pivot and position Posterscope as a leader in the Out Of Home Media sector. His knack for rightly understanding overall business operations and the customers needs helps surface and prioritize the integral parts that drive impact for both. His strong Marketing background coupled with his deep Product acumen allows him drive innovative change that impacts customers. Gavins expertise spans end to end from defining startegy to rolling out experiments.  Gavin is extremely versatile and extremely driven. His passion for prioritizing the customer is genuine. He is a strong communicator and his ability to influence change is impressive.Gavins management style is extremely accessible and he is very hands-on with product management. He has all of the traits you would need in a product executive, is fearless in his business approach, and his instincts are impeccable. Everyone who have worked with him has nothing but respect and admiration for Gavin. I worked with Gavin closely for over 6 years. He is a strong leader who does not hesitate to make needed decisions, keeping the customer, the team and the company in mind. I have great respect for Gavin and I wouldn't hesitate to work on the next pioneering idea with him, as I know it will be transformational.
